productDisplayName: Nike Men Egoli FG Fluorescent Green Sports Shoes
description: A perfect boot for a striker, the nike Egoli Firm Ground cleat is designed to be lightweight to allow great speed and excellent ball control. A great entry level soccer shoe, the nike Egoli FG has a sleek, predatory look that makes it a great lifestyle casual wear shoe as well.UpperTrophy synthetic leather in a sleek silhouette package Knit laces across the centre for snug Fit and to lock the foot in place Padded collar for added comfort and snug fit Invert foldable tongue for funky look Stitch detailing across the toe box for added durability High density recycled sockliner for enhanced comfortMidsoleEVA injected midsole for lightweight feel Full phylon midsole with TPU shank for stability OutsoleCarbon rubber outsole with TPU studs for optimum turf use Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
